title: Fall Fundraiser 2022 – Thank You, Everyone!
summary: Whether you were a donor, a volunteer, a challenger, or all of the above, we want you to know: Thank you, thank you, *thank you* for supporting us during our 2022 Fall Fundraiser! This was our first Fall Fundraiser with a live phone bank since the start of the pandemic, and it was one to remember. From dancing in the halls to live music, to enjoying delicious food from our supporting local businesses, to ringing gongs and taking calls, the atmosphere was electric and eclectic and it was your support that made it po...

title: Delegates at the 2022 AFN Convention passed 25 resolutions including endorsements of Lisa Murkowski and Mary Peltola
summary: ANCHORAGE, AK – On Saturday, the final day of the 2022 AFN Convention, Alaska Federation of Natives delegates voted to pass 25 resolutions , including endorsements of Representative Mary Sattler Peltola and Senator Lisa Murkowski in their respective races to continue representing the great state of...

title: Going Live! Podcast: Heat Pump Rebate Program
summary: In this episode we talk with HEA’s Director of Strategic Services, David Thomas, and Hannah Smith, HEA’s Energy Analyst, all about heat pumps and our new Heat Pump Rebate Program . CLICK HERE TO LISTEN
